headline: IBIT Down 6.4% While FDIG Soars 18.5% in 2026 and Bitcoin Itself Explains Almost Nothing About the Gap
summary: The iShares Bitcoin Trust ETF (NASDAQ:IBIT) and the Fidelity Crypto Industry and Digital Payments ETF (NASDAQ:FDIG) offer fundamentally different exposures. One holds bitcoin itself. The other holds companies that touch bitcoin. So far in 2026, the route through companies has been the better trade by a wide margin: FDIG is up 18.52% year to date ... IBIT Down 6.4% While FDIG Soars 18.5% in 2026 and Bitcoin Itself Explains Almost Nothing About the Gap

headline: 'This Is How America Wins': Mike Novogratz Calls On The Senate To 'Pass The Clarity Act'
summary: The U.S. has a lot to lose if it fails to pass cryptocurrency market structure legislation and even more to gain if it does, Galaxy Digital (NASDAQ:GLXY) CEO Mike Novogratz says. "Pass the Clarity Act," Novogratz said in an X...

headline: Stock Index Futures Slip as Tech Selloff Continues, Iran in Focus
summary: June S&P 500 E-Mini futures (ESM26) are down -0.38%, and June Nasdaq 100 E-Mini futures (NQM26) are down -0.65% this morning, pressured by a retreat in technology stocks, while investors await signs of progress toward a peace deal in the Middle East.

headline: Meta Doubles Down, Reassigns 7,000 Employees To AI Teams While Slashing 8,000 Jobs In Mark Zuckerberg's High-Stakes Push: Report
summary: Meta is shifting 7,000 employees into AI roles while cutting 8,000 jobs as Mark Zuckerberg intensifies the company's AI push.
